channel.title: B. Braun SE — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by B. Braun SE (b.braun).

item.title: CVE-2025-3365 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Relative Path Traversal in OnlineSuite
item.description: A missing protection against path traversal allows to access any file on the server.

item.title: CVE-2025-3322 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in OnlineSuite
item.description: An improper neutralization of inputs used in expression language allows remote code execution with the highest privileges on the server.

item.title: CVE-2025-3321 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Use of Hard-coded Credentials in OnlineSuite
item.description: A predefined administrative account is not documented and cannot be deactivated. This account cannot be misused from the network, only by local users on the server.

item.title: CVE-2023-0888 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Authenticated eval injection in B. Braun Space Battery pack SP with Wi-Fi
item.description: An improper neutralization of directives in dynamically evaluated code vulnerability in the WiFi Battery embedded web server in versions L90/U70 and L92/U92 can be used to gain administrative access to the WiFi communication module. An authenticated…
